MYSTS2MOD-PUPPY_POWER_RELIC.title: Puppy Power
MYSTS2MOD-PUPPY_POWER_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] are [blue]free[/blue] for the turn.
MYSTS2MOD-THE_ROYAL_TUTORS_ASSIGNMENT_RE: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] {singleStarIcon}. At the end of your turn, if your Energy or Stars are not fully depleted, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] next turn.
